news.t: Kensington Hedged Premium Income ETF (KHPI) Celebrates $50M AUM Milestone, Driven by its Innovative Approach to Income

overview.description: The Kensington Hedged Premium Income ETF (KHPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages multiple derivative strategies seeking to generate high monthly income, some upside participation potential in the S&P 500, with a downside hedge. The objective is to offer a more balanced income strategy than other covered option writing strategies. KHPI was launched on Sep 3, 2024 and is issued by Kensington.

data.title: Kensington Hedged Premium Income ETF (KHPI) Celebrates $50M AUM Milestone, Driven by its Innovative Approach to Income
